title: Call Without Response
embodies: Four real texts whose whole form is repetition (a litany, a psalm, a biblical anaphora, a villanelle) are fed to the same closed self-consuming loop from Sessions 15-16. The error mechanism runs live: you read the calls dissolve into nonsense while the most-repeated response survives as the loop's attractor. The measurement (six-seed) places the four real texts on the synthetic tail-density law from Session 16 — closing F-031's mid-range on real text, with the villanelle a mild low-side outlier and a boundary finding: real complete text never reaches the low-tail accretion regime.
